edges.evidence_quote: The D'Alessandro clan also used a network of brokers by which they accessed new supply channels, having contacts even with the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, historical 'Ndrangheta groups from Rosarno in Calabria.
edges.context: The D'Alessandro clan had contacts with the Bellocco 'ndrina for drug supply.

edges.evidence_quote: The D'Alessandro clan also used a network of brokers by which they accessed new supply channels, having contacts even with the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, historical 'Ndrangheta groups from Rosarno in Calabria.
edges.context: The D'Alessandro clan had contacts with the Pesce 'ndrina for drug supply.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1993, the Camorra and the Sicilian Mafia were accused of running a $1.5 billion operation to launder drug money through banks, insurance companies, hotels and casinos in Italy and on the French Riviera, arresting 36 suspects.
edges.context: The Camorra and Sicilian Mafia jointly operated a money laundering scheme.

edges.evidence_quote: In June 2019 the operation Spaghetti Connection dismantled an international drug network involving the Camorra and the 'Ndrangheta in Abidjan and Tabou.
edges.context: The Camorra and 'Ndrangheta were involved together in an international drug network.

edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.context: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the 'Ndrangheta.

edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.context: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sicilian Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: Giuseppe Polverino, the leader of the Polverino clan before his arrest, was considered the 'hashish king', due to his monopoly on the importation of hashish from Morocco to Italy via Spain supplying not only all the Camorra clans, but also the 'Ndrangheta, the Sicilian Mafia and the Sacra Corona Unita.
edges.context: The Polverino clan supplied hashish to the Sacra Corona Unita.

edges.evidence_quote: The Sacco-Bocchetti clan is a subgroup of the Licciardi clan
edges.context: The Sacco-Bocchetti clan is a subgroup of the Licciardi clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Also in 2019, relatives of top members belonging to the Polverino clan claim three million euros to the Spanish State of compensation after their relatives were acquitted by the National Court of the crime of money laundering for which they were arrested in 2013 and tried in 2016.
edges.context: Polverino clan is a Camorra clan.

edges.evidence_quote: The Casalesi clan is present throughout the country, and according to the investigations into the clan, it has numerous Swiss bank accounts.
edges.context: Casalesi clan is a Camorra clan.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1992, Ciro Mazzarella , the late boss of the Mazzarella clan , decided to move to Switzerland, after losing a war between Camorra clans in Naples.
edges.context: Mazzarella clan is a Camorra clan.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2017, assets worth €20 million belonging to the Potenza brothers, who are considered to be linked to the Lo Russo clan , were seized in Lugano, including bank accounts in BSI .
edges.context: Lo Russo clan is a Camorra clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Righi, called "Tonino il biondo", was considered by the investigators as a money laudererer on behalf of the Contini and Mazzarella clans in London .
edges.context: Contini clan is a Camorra clan.

edges.evidence_quote: He is the brother of Camorra boss Augusto La Torre of the La Torre clan which had its base in Mondragone , Caserta .
edges.context: La Torre clan is a Camorra clan.

edges.evidence_quote: They rivaled the now defunct Morello crime family for power in New York City.
edges.context: Camorra rivaled the Morello crime family in New York City.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2012, the Obama administration imposed sanctions on the Camorra as one of four key transnational organized crime groups, along with the Brothers' Circle from Russia, the Yamaguchi-gumi (Japan's largest yakuza organization), and Los Zetas from Mexico.
edges.context: Camorra and Brothers' Circle were both sanctioned by the US in 2012, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2012, the Obama administration imposed sanctions on the Camorra as one of four key transnational organized crime groups, along with the Brothers' Circle from Russia, the Yamaguchi-gumi (Japan's largest yakuza organization), and Los Zetas from Mexico.
edges.context: Camorra and Yamaguchi-gumi were both sanctioned by the US in 2012, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2012, the Obama administration imposed sanctions on the Camorra as one of four key transnational organized crime groups, along with the Brothers' Circle from Russia, the Yamaguchi-gumi (Japan's largest yakuza organization), and Los Zetas from Mexico.
edges.context: Camorra and Los Zetas were both sanctioned by the US in 2012, but no direct relationship is stated.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the media, there have always been alliances between the Camorra and the 'Ndrangheta members.
edges.context: Camorra and 'Ndrangheta have alliances.

edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, Domenico Tripodo , a powerful 'Ndrangheta boss of the time, was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefano 'ndrina , and with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo , the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano's in drug trafficking.
edges.context: Nuova Camorra Organizzata is a Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo.

edges.evidence_quote: Several Camorra clans have lasting relationships with the Cosa Nostra .
edges.context: Camorra clans have lasting relationships with Cosa Nostra.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1981, Raffaele Cutolo , entrusted Pino Iannelli and Alessandro Fusco the task of founding an organization in Apulia to be directly controlled by the Nuova Camorra Organizzata , the organization was named Nuova Camorra Pugliese, later called Sacra Corona Unita .
edges.context: Sacra Corona Unita was originally founded as a subgroup of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (Camorra).

edges.evidence_quote: In September 2019, the Italian police dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società foggiana , also known as the fifth-mafia, and Moroccan drug traffickers.
edges.context: Camorra's Gionta clan allied with Società foggiana in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia, the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano, both from Naples and with the Serino clan, from Salerno .
edges.context: Albanian mafia has alliances with several Camorra clans.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the expert on terrorist organizations and mafia-type organized crime Antonio De Bonis, there is a close relationship between the Triads and the Camorra, and the port of Naples is the most important landing point of the trades managed by the Chinese groups in cooperation with the Camorra.
edges.context: Camorra has a close relationship with Chinese Triads, cooperating in illegal activities.

edges.evidence_quote: Cooperation between the Camorra and Nigerian mafia is mainly in the areas of drug trafficking and prostitution.
edges.context: Camorra and Nigerian mafia cooperate in drug trafficking and prostitution.

edges.evidence_quote: According to numerous articles, the Camorra may be in alliance with the Islamic State .
edges.context: Camorra may be in alliance with Islamic State for drug distribution.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, the Camorra cooperated with the Russian Mafia in a scheme in which the Camorra would bleach out US$1 bills and reprint them as $100s.
edges.context: Camorra cooperated with Russian Mafia in counterfeiting scheme.

edges.evidence_quote: In the 2000s, the Ukrainian mafia cooperated with Camorra clans in the cigarette smuggling business.
edges.context: Ukrainian mafia cooperated with Camorra clans in cigarette smuggling.

edges.evidence_quote: Antonio Righi, called "Tonino il biondo", was considered by the investigators as a money laudererer on behalf of the Contini and Mazzarella clans in London . Although the two organizations are historically rivals, in England they were represented by the same man.
edges.context: Contini and Mazzarella clans are historically rivals but shared a money launderer in London.

edges.evidence_quote: On 26 August 1976, Domenico Tripodo , a powerful 'Ndrangheta boss of the time, was stabbed to death in prison on the request of the De Stefano 'ndrina , and with the help of Camorra boss Raffaele Cutolo , the boss of the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO) who worked with the De Stefano's in drug trafficking.
edges.context: De Stefano 'ndrina and Nuova Camorra Organizzata cooperated in drug trafficking and a murder.

edges.evidence_quote: The Tamanaco operation that ended on 22 June 2010, destroyed a drug trafficking operation managed by the La Torre clan from Mondragone and the Barbaro 'ndrina from Platì .
edges.context: La Torre clan and Barbaro 'ndrina cooperated in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: On 11 May 2016, a criminal alliance between the Sinti criminal organization Casamonica clan , members of the Camorra, and affiliates from the 'Ndrangheta 's of Polistena , Taurianova and Melicucco was dismantled by the police.
edges.context: Casamonica clan allied with Camorra members.

edges.evidence_quote: On 21 March 2018, 19 arrests were made in Rome of alleged members belonging to the Licciardi clan of the Camorra and members of the Filippone 'ndrina and Gallico 'ndrina accused of drug trafficking.
edges.context: Licciardi clan and Filippone 'ndrina were arrested together for drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: On 21 March 2018, 19 arrests were made in Rome of alleged members belonging to the Licciardi clan of the Camorra and members of the Filippone 'ndrina and Gallico 'ndrina accused of drug trafficking.
edges.context: Licciardi clan and Gallico 'ndrina were arrested together for drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, investigations of the Italian police reveals links between the Contini clan and the Crupi brothers, members of the powerful Commisso 'ndrina . Both organizations are reportedly cooperating in the drug trafficking business.
edges.context: Contini clan and Commisso 'ndrina cooperate in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: Prominent elements of the Mafia such as Salvatore Riina , Leoluca Bagarella , Luciano Leggio and Bernardo Provenzano found themselves in contact with Camorra clans such as the Nuvoletta clan , members of the Camorra such as Michele Zaza and Antonio Bardellino , and with other groups that formed the Nuova Famiglia confederation in the 1980s.
edges.context: Nuvoletta clan had contact with Cosa Nostra elements.

edges.evidence_quote: In the past, the Russo clan had links with the Mafia, particularly in the 1980s and 1990s, at the time of the Corleonesi Mafia era.
edges.context: Russo clan had links with Cosa Nostra in the 1980s and 1990s.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia of Catania dismantled a scheme between the Camorra's Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan and members of the powerful Catania Mafia family , led by Vincenzo Enrico Augusto Ercolano, son of Giuseppe Ercolano (deceased, but once an important member of the Catania's mafia) and Grazia Santapaola, the sister of the historical boss Benedetto Santapaola .
edges.context: Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan cooperated in a scheme with Catania Mafia family.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia of Catania dismantled a scheme between the Camorra's Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan and members of the powerful Catania Mafia family , led by Vincenzo Enrico Augusto Ercolano, son of Giuseppe Ercolano (deceased, but once an important member of the Catania's mafia) and Grazia Santapaola, the sister of the historical boss Benedetto Santapaola .
edges.context: Mallardo clan cooperated with Catania Mafia family.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2019, the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia of Catania dismantled a scheme between the Camorra's Mallardo clan and Casalesi clan and members of the powerful Catania Mafia family , led by Vincenzo Enrico Augusto Ercolano, son of Giuseppe Ercolano (deceased, but once an important member of the Catania's mafia) and Grazia Santapaola, the sister of the historical boss Benedetto Santapaola .
edges.context: Casalesi clan cooperated with Catania Mafia family.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the pentito Domenico Verde, the Polverino clan has a good relationship with the Cosa Nostra families from Palermo , in particular thanks to the drug trafficking business.
edges.context: Polverino clan has a good relationship with Cosa Nostra families from Palermo.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the pentito Antonio Accurso, the Di Lauro clan has several links to the Sacra Corona Unita in question with regards to drug trafficking.
edges.context: Di Lauro clan has links to Sacra Corona Unita in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: In September 2019, the Italian police dismantled an international drug trafficking alliance between the powerful Gionta clan of the Camorra, the Società foggiana , also known as the fifth-mafia, and Moroccan drug traffickers.
edges.context: Gionta clan allied with Società foggiana in drug trafficking.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia, the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano, both from Naples and with the Serino clan, from Salerno .
edges.context: Albanian mafia has alliances with Mazzarella clan.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia, the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano, both from Naples and with the Serino clan, from Salerno .
edges.context: Albanian mafia has alliances with Scissionisti di Secondigliano.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the Direzione Investigativa Antimafia, the Albanian mafia has alliances with the Mazzarella clan and with the Scissionisti di Secondigliano, both from Naples and with the Serino clan, from Salerno .
edges.context: Albanian mafia has alliances with Serino clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Among the Camorra clans involved in this alliance were the Casalesi clan , the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan.
edges.context: Casalesi clan was involved in an alliance with Chinese Triads in industrial waste scheme.

edges.evidence_quote: Among the Camorra clans involved in this alliance were the Casalesi clan , the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan.
edges.context: Fabbrocino clan was involved in an alliance with Chinese Triads in industrial waste scheme.

edges.evidence_quote: Among the Camorra clans involved in this alliance were the Casalesi clan , the Fabbrocino clan and the Ascione clan.
edges.context: Ascione clan was involved in an alliance with Chinese Triads in industrial waste scheme.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2005, it was alleged the Camorra created safe houses, forged documents, firearms, and explosives to Al-Qaeda in return for narcotics, which are brought into Italy via the Adriatic Sea.
edges.context: Camorra allegedly provided safe houses, forged documents, firearms, and explosives to Al-Qaeda in exchange for narcotics.

edges.evidence_quote: According to Misso, the real power of the organization is now in the hands of the Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Moccia clan and Contini clan.
edges.context: Licciardi clan is one of the clans holding real power within the Camorra.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the reports of the DIA about the Camorra, the Mazzarella clan, despite the bloody war against the Rinaldi clan, is still one of the most powerful organizations in Campania, dominating the territory in various neighbourhoods, and having numerous groups under their influence, as the Ferraiuolo clan.
edges.context: Mazzarella clan is a powerful organization within the Camorra, dominating territory and having groups under its influence.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the reports of the DIA about the Camorra, the Mazzarella clan, despite the bloody war against the Rinaldi clan, is still one of the most powerful organizations in Campania...

edges.evidence_quote: The clan was founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa... and was famous for the bloody war against the once powerful Sarno clan.
edges.context: De Luca Bossa clan fought a bloody war against the Sarno clan.

edges.evidence_quote: After a time inactive, the De Luca Bossa clan is believed to be gaining power again in the eastern area of Naples... thanks to the merger with emergent groups as the Minichini and Schisa.
edges.context: De Luca Bossa clan merged with Minichini group.

edges.evidence_quote: According to numerous 2019 reports, the most powerful clans of the Camorra are the Secondigliano Alliance and the Mazzarella clan.
edges.context: Secondigliano Alliance is one of the most powerful clans within the Camorra.
